transcript:
Speaker A: Hello. 
Speaker B: Hello. 
Speaker A: आता काय बोलायचं? [What to say now?] 
Speaker B: मला पण तसेच वाटतंय. [I feel the same way.] 
Speaker A: How are you, Neha? 
Speaker B: I am... छान आहे मी. [I am... I am fine.] 
Speaker A: तसं नाही, असं बोल: I am good. [Not like that, say it like this: I am good.] 
Speaker B: I am good. 
Speaker C (Voiceover): MySivi app वर १ कोटी लोक spoken English ची प्रॅक्टिस करतात. तुम्ही पण आजच सुरू करा. ट्रायल फक्त १ रुपयात. [Over 1 crore people practice spoken English on MySivi app. You should also start today. Trial for just 1 rupee.]
on_screen_text:
MySivi

summary: A woman struggles to speak English during a call, and her partner corrects her phrasing. The ad then promotes the MySivi app as a tool used by over 10 million people to practice spoken English, offering a trial for just ₹1.
